publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-12-03 23:16:43 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Correspondence, Financial documents, Photographs, Printed materials, Publications
did.abstract: Material pertaining to the founding, meetings, worship, and activities of the temple, a congregation in the United Synagogue of Conservative Judaism.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Minutes, account books, lists, financial statements, correspondence, publications and other material pertaining to the founding, meetings, worship, and activities of the temple, a congregation in the United Synagogue of Conservative Judaism. Includes the Temple Beth-El Bulletin. Deeds and documents relating to the building and cemetery, photographs, seals and other items from the Temple are also included.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Temple Beth-El records, #3834. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The name of the bulletin varies. Some editions missing.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains copy of October 29,1978 Mortgage, March 1968 Agreement.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes various letters to the editor and articles.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes: Iton Ithaca, The Temple Times, The Temple Tribune, The Jewish Theological Society of America News.

did.unittitle: Rules and Regulations for the Cemeteries; including board resolutions, etc.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes: photos, cemetery deed, plot information, article "The High Cost of Dying" by Ruth Mulvey Harmer, correspondence.

did.unittitle: History of the Cemeteries: Including Maps and Records
Construction Specifications and General Conditions for the Addition and Alterations to Temple Beth-El

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Materials previously in binder.

did.unittitle: Additions and Alterations to Temple Beth-El

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Program report.

did.unittitle: Wish List, Memorials, and Miscellaneous Information

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes: Temple Beth-El Wish List, Guide to Congregational Standards, selections from The Reporter.

did.unittitle: Ithaca Community Union Thanksgiving Service Brochures

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes: brochures, correspondence, and articles regarding the tercentenary of the American Jewish community.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes: event brochures, correspondence, documents, etc.

did.unittitle: Publications from the Jewish Theological Society of America

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes: "Aspects of Rabbinic Theology" by Solomon Schechter and "The Unseen Powerful Force in Life" by Rabbi Bernard Mandelbaum.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Booklets for 1978, 1988, and 2003 anniversaries.

did.unittitle: Bronze Tablet Plaques Name Plate Pledge Forms

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Pad of blank actual size drawings of name plates for pledges.

did.unittitle: Board of Trustees Minutes January 26, 1966 to June 21, 1967

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bound notebook; includes some inserted pages.

did.unittitle: Board of Trustees Minutes June 21, 1967 to (November 9, 1967)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bound notebook; includes note on front cover "extensive on addition building".

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopies of handwritten and typed pages from a binder.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Handwritten and typed pages from a binder.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Handwritten and typed pages from a binder.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopied typed pages from a binder.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopied typed pages from a binder.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopied typed pages from a binder.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Handwritten and typed pages from a binder

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Handwritten pages from a binder

did.unittitle: Minutes of Women's Auxiliary of Temple Beth-El

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bound notebook.

did.unittitle: Minutes of Women's Auxiliary of Temple Beth-El (Typed)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Typed by Anne G. Kramer, June 1978, in spiral binding.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bound notebook, includes financial records and minutes.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bound notebook, spine is detached, papers inserted into book, drawings on inside covers.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes Constitution And Bylaws of Temple Beth-El, various mailings regarding temple policy.

did.unittitle: The Rabbinical Society of America (כנסית הרבנים באמריקה)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence sent to Temple Beth-El.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Copies of letters sent to new members of the temple.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Sealable envelope with two plastic rings, opens up to pages with information about several Jewish holidays. Text in Hebrew and English.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Booklet of instructions for craft-making for children, published by the Overseas Youth Department of the Jewish National Fund, Jerusalem.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Written by Dvora Lapson.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Illustrated by Sigmund Forst.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Items stored horizontally in box, with one folders and four books.

did.unittitle: Ithaca Supreme Court Proceedings, Agoodash Achim vs. Temple Beth El/Lakeview Cemetery

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Book in fastened paper binding.

did.unittitle: Congregation Agudis Achim Book of Minutes

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bound notebook, includes inserted papers.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes Meeting of April 21, 1935, member dues ledger, papers inside cover.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Front and back covers have been detached from spine.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Two papers previously in a larger package; reservation for plots.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Can deaccession.

did.unittitle: Deed - Agoodash Achim to Temple Beth-El, Lakeview Cemetery Plots

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes copy of the deed, memos to Ralph Marvin, and copies of minutes concerning the subject.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: List of Cash Donations and Pledges, record of paid contributions.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence, receipts of donations, lists of uncollected and collected pledge donations.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Ledger with names and addresses of contributors, and dates and amounts of donations.

did.unittitle: Cornell Jewish Temple Fund Administrative Account

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Ledger with deposits and withdrawals including specific allocations of voucher money.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes 24 prints, 36 negatives.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes 33 prints, 19 negatives.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes 49 prints, 37 negatives, sales receipt.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes 19 prints, 16 negatives, sales receipt.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Two photocopies of photographs of the temple, one paper with "G.E Advanced Electronics Center Print From Negative No. 4546 (m), 1963".

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 12 prints.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 11 prints.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 51 prints.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 5 prints, includes envelope marked "Payment enclosed".

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 7 prints.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 15 prints.

did.unittitle: Purim Pictures, Judith and David Tanenbaum 1997

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 32 prints.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 5 prints.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 3 prints.

did.unittitle: Community Reception and Brunch, Temple Beth-El

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photo album, 27 prints.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Box with return address of J.S. Hecht. Includes 19 color slides.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Metal rod with chain, hand with pointer finger (detached); used for reading scripture.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Facsimile scroll of the Book of Psalms on one roller, with fabric cover marked "Psalms of David". One knob at the end of the roller missing. Text in English.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Facsimile scroll of the Story of Esther, includes fabric cover marked "מגילת אסתר Story of Esther", stored in cardboard box. Text in Hebrew.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Facsimile scroll of the Story of Esther, includes fabric cover marked "מגילת אסתר Story of Esther", stored in cardboard box. Text in Hebrew. Rolled up with flyer for the Matzoh Fund (Text in Hebrew and English) and telegram from Kollel America.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Six stamps of varying sizes; three imprinted with the image of Temple Beth-El, one imprinted with image of a lamp, one with image of a menorah, and one with image of a scroll marked "USY"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Metal pocket seal (two parts which fit together); seal reads "Temple Beth-El of Ithaca, NY, Inc. 1924". Includes instruction guide, leather case, identification labels, "The Sigwalt Notary and Corporation Handbook"; stored in "Official" cardboard box.

did.unittitle: "A Gift from Menorah Chapels...to remember the important celebrations of our faith."

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Information on the holidays of Rosh Hashana, Yom Kippur, Sukkot, Chanukah, and Passover; Drawings of religious objects.

did.unittitle: The Early History of Temple Beth-El

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: CD Format, return address of Matt Braun.

did.unittitle: Temple Beth-El 75th Anniversary Program, Audio cassette

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Posters printed with photographs, articles, and other historical documents. Prepared by congregant Matthew Braun, director of the Tompkins County History Center, for the 75th anniversary commemoration event at Temple Beth-El.

did.unittitle: "Snapshots Of Our Community" by Matthew Braun; description of the panel collection.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 11" x 11" Board

did.unittitle: Photo of people crowding around the temple, sign reading "The New Religious School, Expanded Sanctuary Social Hall, Temple Beth El".

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 11" x 11" Board

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 11" x 11" Board

did.unittitle: Photos, letter, and program of Cornerstone Laying, Sunday August 26, 1928, 3 PM.

scopecontent.p: 11" x 11" Board

scopecontent.p: 11" x 11" Board

did.unittitle: Article, "The Future Jew and Jewess of Cornell"

scopecontent.p: 11" x 11" Board

did.unittitle: Article, "How Proposed Jewish Temple in Ithaca Will Look if the Local Campaign for Funds is Successful; Reasons Given Why Public Should Aid Project"

scopecontent.p: 11" x 11" Board

did.unittitle: Pictures of Mr. and Mrs. Nathan Hanford, 1898-99; Letter to Daniel Rothschild from Unitarian Church about donations.

scopecontent.p: 11" x 11" Board

scopecontent.p: 11" x 11" Board

did.unittitle: Interior of Temple Beth-El, Tioga and Court Streets Ithaca NY, Facing West towards the sanctuary balcony from inside the roof dome.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 24" x 16" Board. Photo by Richard Jump marking his participation in the Bnai Torah Celebration of Parashah/Shabbat VaYakhel.

scopecontent.p: 24" x 16" Board. Photo by Richard Jump marking his participation in the Bnai Torah Celebration of Parashah/Shabbat VaYakhel.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 24" x 16" Board. Photo by Richard Jump marking his participation in the Bnai Torah Celebration of Parashah/Shabbat VaYakhel.

did.unittitle: Inside the dome of Temple Beth-El, Tioga and Court Streets Ithaca NY (4)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 24" x 16" Board. Photo by Richard Jump marking his participation in the Bnai Torah Celebration of Parashah/Shabbat VaYakhel.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Posters with attached photographs, articles, and other historical documents.

did.unittitle: Articles: "Klansman Spells Out His Beliefs in Exclusive Interview", "Klan 'Ideals' Suspect, Anti-Defamation Chief Says", "Teachers to Have Workshop Session", "Teachers Urged to Meet Child's Emotional Needs"; Info and photos of Gertrude Noar, Daniel Rothschild Lodge.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Certain items highlighted and connected with arrows.

did.unittitle: "B'nai B'rith Vocational Service"; B'nai B'rith Commission on Israel, Bulletin for February 1966; A.D.L. Guest Speaker Hersh L. Adlerstein; Hillel at Cornell University, Spring 1966; The ADL Bulletin, September 1965, "Are Europe's Jews in Danger?"; B'nai B'rith Adult Jewish Education "Time For Torah"; Leo N. Levi Memorial Hospital, letter from Fannie B. McLaughlin to Mr. Marvin; photo of B'nai B'rith Building, Washington, D.C.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Certain items highlighted and connected with arrows.

did.unittitle: Daniel Rothschild Lodge 1450 B'nai Birth, Open Meeting for Husbands and Wives, September 21, 1965; "B'nai B'rith To Present Essay Prizes"; "Brotherhood Essay"; "Classes Learn Lessons Of Brotherhood Week"; "Servicemen Write Thanks For Cayugan Each Month"; Tompkins County Mental Health Association, "Breakdown"; "Flower Pots"; Letter of thanks from Ithaca Junior Bowling Council to B'nai B'rith; "Fifteen Institutions Consider The Organization Of New Scout Units"; Inter-Fraternal Council, Ithaca, New York, Members Lists; "Event Honors 17 Inductees"; The Cayugan, 2 March, 1966; Letter from Rabbi Henry E. Barneis to B'nai B'rith Daniel Rothschild Lodge; Daniel Rothschild Lodge 1450 B'nai B'rith meetings, 1965-1966.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Certain items highlighted and connected with arrows. Sticky note on back reading "Matt Braun".

did.unittitle: Award Of Honor for the Sisterhood Beth El Ithaca, given by The Jewish Theological Seminary of America
Certificate of Membership of Temple Beth-El to The Union of American Hebrew Congregations
Charter of Affiliation of Temple Beth-El to The United Synagogue of America
State of New York Office of the Secretary of State, Certificate of Incorporation of Temple Beth-El of Ithaca, New York, Inc.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Signed by James A. Hamilton.
